requirement_topic.en: EMC — Fiji Bureau of Standards (FBS/FBOS) Standards Alignment
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 — 斐济标准局（FBS/FBOS）标准对接
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 — 斐濟標準局（FBS/FBOS）標準對接

summary.en: Fiji does not operate a mandatory EMC certification or marking scheme for wireless and IoT devices equivalent to Australia's ACMA EMC framework or the EU's CE marking. The Fiji Bureau of Standards (FBS, also referred to as FBOS in trade contexts) adopts or references AS/NZS standards, meaning AS/NZS CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment emissions) and related IEC/CISPR standards are the internationally recognised benchmarks applicable in the Fiji market. Demonstrating compliance with AS/NZS or IEC CISPR standards is expected good practice and may be required by importers, retailers, or TRR as part of type approval technical documentation. There is no mandatory EMC declaration or mark unique to Fiji for most wireless product categories.
summary.zh: 斐济目前没有针对无线及物联网设备的强制EMC认证或标志方案，与澳大利亚ACMA EMC框架或欧盟CE标志体系相当。斐济标准局（FBS，贸易语境中亦称FBOS）采用或参考AS/NZS标准，意味着AS/NZS CISPR 32（多媒体设备发射标准）及相关IEC/CISPR标准是斐济市场适用的国际公认基准。证明符合AS/NZS或IEC CISPR标准是公认的良好做法，进口商、零售商或TRR在型号认证技术文件中也可能提出此要求。目前斐济针对大多数无线产品类别，无特有的强制EMC声明或标志要求。
summary.zht: 斐濟目前沒有針對無線及物聯網設備的強制EMC認證或標誌方案，與澳洲ACMA EMC框架或歐盟CE標誌體系相當。斐濟標準局（FBS，貿易語境中亦稱FBOS）採用或參考AS/NZS標準，意味著AS/NZS CISPR 32（多媒體設備發射標準）及相關IEC/CISPR標準是斐濟市場適用的國際公認基準。證明符合AS/NZS或IEC CISPR標準是公認的良好做法，進口商、零售商或TRR在型號認證技術文件中也可能提出此要求。目前斐濟針對大多數無線產品類別，無特有的強制EMC聲明或標誌要求。

standards_or_laws: Fiji Bureau of Standards (FBS) — national standards body adopting and referencing AS/NZS standards
AS/NZS CISPR 32 — multimedia equipment emissions standard (referenced in Fiji market context)
IEC CISPR 32 — international emissions standard baseline
Fiji Commerce Commission Act — commerce and trade practices oversight

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for IT and multimedia equipment commonly uses GB/T 9254.1 (aligned with CISPR 32 for emissions) and GB/T 17618 or related GB/T immunity standards. Products in the CCC catalogue require CCC EMC testing and certification through designated laboratories. Chinese EMC reports reference GB standards and Chinese test configurations, which differ from AS/NZS or IEC CISPR references expected in the Fiji market context.
summary.zh: 在中国，IT及多媒体设备的EMC合规通常采用GB/T 9254.1（与CISPR 32发射要求相对应）以及GB/T 17618或相关GB/T抗扰度标准。列入CCC目录的产品须通过指定实验室进行CCC EMC检测和认证。中国EMC报告引用GB标准及中国测试配置，与斐济市场语境下所参照的AS/NZS或IEC CISPR标准有所不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，IT及多媒體設備的EMC合規通常採用GB/T 9254.1（與CISPR 32發射要求相對應）以及GB/T 17618或相關GB/T抗擾度標準。列入CCC目錄的產品須通過指定實驗室進行CCC EMC檢測和認證。中國EMC報告引用GB標準及中國測試配置，與斐濟市場語境下所參照的AS/NZS或IEC CISPR標準有所不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1 — Information technology equipment; radio disturbance characteristics (CISPR 32 aligned)
GB/T 17618 — Information technology equipment; immunity characteristics
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (EMC component) for listed product categories

gap.en: No mandatory EMC certification authority or scheme exists in Fiji that directly accepts or mirrors the Chinese CCC EMC process. Chinese GB/T EMC reports are not submitted to a Fiji authority but may be used as internal technical evidence if the test scope and limits align with AS/NZS or IEC CISPR references. Importers and TRR may request AS/NZS CISPR 32 or equivalent test reports as part of the type approval technical file. Re-testing to AS/NZS CISPR 32 is advisable when Chinese reports do not explicitly cover AS/NZS or IEC CISPR limits.
gap.zh: 斐济目前没有直接接受或对应中国CCC EMC流程的强制EMC认证机构或方案。中国GB/T EMC报告无需提交斐济主管机构，但若测试范围和限值与AS/NZS或IEC CISPR标准相符，可作为内部技术证据使用。进口商和TRR可能在型号认证技术文件中要求提供AS/NZS CISPR 32或等效测试报告。当中国报告未明确覆盖AS/NZS或IEC CISPR限值时，建议按AS/NZS CISPR 32重新测试。
gap.zht: 斐濟目前沒有直接接受或對應中國CCC EMC流程的強制EMC認證機構或方案。中國GB/T EMC報告無需提交斐濟主管機構，但若測試範圍和限值與AS/NZS或IEC CISPR標準相符，可作為內部技術證據使用。進口商和TRR可能在型號認證技術文件中要求提供AS/NZS CISPR 32或等效測試報告。當中國報告未明確覆蓋AS/NZS或IEC CISPR限值時，建議按AS/NZS CISPR 32重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory EMC certification scheme specific to Fiji for most wireless/IoT product categories; compliance with AS/NZS or IEC CISPR standards is expected practice and may be required by TRR in type approval technical documentation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC EMC certification for products in the CCC catalogue; GB/T EMC compliance required for all electrical and electronic products

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fiji has no mandatory EMC certification mark equivalent to RCM or CE. Compliance with AS/NZS CISPR 32 or IEC CISPR 32 is expected good practice and may be required by TRR or importers. Chinese GB/T CCC EMC reports do not automatically satisfy Fiji market expectations if AS/NZS or IEC CISPR limits are not explicitly covered.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斐济没有相当于RCM或CE的强制EMC认证标志。符合AS/NZS CISPR 32或IEC CISPR 32是公认的良好做法，TRR或进口商可能要求提供相应证明。若中国GB/T CCC EMC报告未明确覆盖AS/NZS或IEC CISPR限值，则不会自动满足斐济市场预期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斐濟沒有相當於RCM或CE的強制EMC認證標誌。符合AS/NZS CISPR 32或IEC CISPR 32是公認的良好做法，TRR或進口商可能要求提供相應證明。若中國GB/T CCC EMC報告未明確覆蓋AS/NZS或IEC CISPR限值，則不會自動滿足斐濟市場預期。

requirement_topic.en: Product Labelling and Marking — English Language Sufficiency
requirement_topic.zh: 产品标签与标志 — 英语语言适用性
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標籤與標誌 — 英語語言適用性

summary.en: English-language labelling is sufficient for the Fiji market. No additional local-language requirement applies. Product labelling should include the manufacturer name, country of origin, model number, rated voltage and frequency (240 V / 50 Hz), and relevant safety warnings in English. Where TRR type approval has been granted, TRR may require the approval number to be marked on the product or packaging. There is no mandatory equivalent to the RCM mark or CE marking in Fiji for wireless devices.
summary.zh: 英语标签在斐济市场已足够，无需额外的本地语言标签要求。产品标签应包括制造商名称、原产地、型号、额定电压和频率（240V/50Hz）以及英语安全警告。取得TRR型号认证后，TRR可能要求在产品或包装上标注认证编号。斐济针对无线设备无相当于RCM标志或CE标志的强制标志要求。
summary.zht: 英語標籤在斐濟市場已足夠，無需額外的本地語言標籤要求。產品標籤應包括製造商名稱、原產地、型號、額定電壓和頻率（240V/50Hz）以及英語安全警告。取得TRR型號認證後，TRR可能要求在產品或包裝上標注認證編號。斐濟針對無線設備無相當於RCM標誌或CE標誌的強制標誌要求。

standards_or_laws: Fiji Consumer Council and Commerce Commission — general product labelling and consumer protection requirements
TRR Type Approval conditions — may specify approval number marking on approved equipment
Fiji Trade Standards — country of origin and product marking requirements

summary.en: In China, product labelling must be in Chinese. CCC-certified products must bear the CCC mark. Labels must include manufacturer details, product model, rated parameters, and GB standard references where applicable. Chinese-only labelling is mandatory for the domestic China market and is not appropriate for the Fiji market.
summary.zh: 在中国，产品标签须使用中文。CCC认证产品须加贴CCC标志。标签须包含制造商信息、产品型号、额定参数及适用的GB标准引用。纯中文标签是中国境内市场的强制要求，不适用于斐济市场。
summary.zht: 在中國，產品標籤須使用中文。CCC認證產品須加貼CCC標誌。標籤須包含製造商資訊、產品型號、額定參數及適用的GB標準引用。純中文標籤是中國境內市場的強制要求，不適用於斐濟市場。

standards_or_laws: GB 5296 series — consumer product instruction and labelling requirements (Chinese language mandatory)
CCC mark — mandatory for products in CCC catalogue
GB 4343.1 / GB/T 9254.1 — product standard marking requirements

gap.en: Chinese-only labelling and CCC marks are not appropriate or required for the Fiji market. English-language labels must be used. CCC marks may remain on the product but carry no regulatory meaning in Fiji and should not be presented as evidence of Fiji compliance. Where TRR type approval is obtained, the TRR approval number should be marked on the product or packaging as required by TRR conditions.
gap.zh: 纯中文标签及CCC标志不适用于斐济市场，也非斐济市场所要求。产品须使用英语标签。CCC标志可保留于产品上，但在斐济不具备监管意义，不应作为斐济合规证明。取得TRR型号认证后，应按TRR认证条件要求，在产品或包装上标注TRR认证编号。
gap.zht: 純中文標籤及CCC標誌不適用於斐濟市場，也非斐濟市場所要求。產品須使用英語標籤。CCC標誌可保留於產品上，但在斐濟不具備監管意義，不應作為斐濟合規證明。取得TRR型號認證後，應按TRR認證條件要求，在產品或包裝上標注TRR認證編號。

mandatory_status.target: English labelling mandatory; TRR approval number marking as required by TRR conditions; no mandatory EMC or safety mark scheme equivalent to RCM for most wireless product categories
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory Chinese-language labelling; CCC mark mandatory for listed product categories; GB standard references required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] English labelling is sufficient for Fiji. Chinese-only labels and CCC marks carry no regulatory weight in Fiji. TRR approval number marking may be required after type approval is granted. No RCM-equivalent mark is mandated for wireless devices in Fiji.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 英语标签在斐济已满足要求。纯中文标签和CCC标志在斐济不具监管效力。取得型号认证后，可能需要标注TRR认证编号。斐济对无线设备无强制要求等同于RCM的标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 英語標籤在斐濟已滿足要求。純中文標籤和CCC標誌在斐濟不具監管效力。取得型號認證後，可能需要標注TRR認證編號。斐濟對無線設備無強制要求等同於RCM的標誌。
